title: hieracium murorum subsp. abastumanense
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. abastumanense is a subspecies of Hieracium murorum, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is also known as the "wall hawkweed" and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Hieracium murorum subsp. abastumanense contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
